title: KnowledgeGraph
description: So do tri thuc (skill graph) trich xuat tu chuong trinh Tieng Anh cua truong (vd docs/2026 syllabus - Academy Star (revised).xlsx). Node = ky nang/lesson trong syllabus, edge = quan he tien quyet giua cac ky nang. skill_id o day phai khop voi field skill_id trong placement-test.schema.json.

source.description: File/tai lieu goc dung de trich xuat.

edge_type.description: Loai quan he giua cac node (hien chi ho tro 'prerequisite' = ky nang tien quyet).

edge_note.description: Ghi chu ve gia dinh/han che khi sinh edges (vd: chuoi tuyen tinh mac dinh, chua qua ra soat chuyen mon).

grades_covered.description: Danh sach khoi lop duoc bao phu trong graph nay.

skill_id.description: Dinh danh duy nhat cua ky nang, format 'as{grade}.{unit_slug}.l{lesson_order}', vd 'as3.u1.l4'. unit_slug = 'welcome' hoac 'u{n}'.

unit_order.description: Thu tu Unit trong khoi lop do (0 = Welcome, 1..10 = Unit 1..10).

unit_name.description: Ten Unit nguyen ban tu syllabus.

lesson_title.description: Ten Lesson nguyen ban, vd 'Lesson 4: Grammar'.

objectives.description: Danh sach muc tieu hoc tap (trich tu muc 'I. Objectives:' trong syllabus).

content.description: Noi dung chi tiet theo tung muc (vd 'content', 'vocabulary', 'grammar'), key = ten muc (lowercase), value = danh sach bullet.

homework.description: Bai tap ve nha tuong ung, vd 'Workbook page 11'.

from.description: skill_id cua ky nang tien quyet (cha).

to.description: skill_id cua ky nang phu thuoc (con).
